emergency.description: Critical equipment failure? Our team is on-site within hours.

commercial.rfpSubtitle: Tell us about your facility and we'll send a tailored service plan within 24 hours.

automotive.headline:
Beat the Miami Heat.
Every Drive.
automotive.subheadline: Professional automotive AC diagnosis, recharge, and repair for all vehicle makes and models.

recharge.title: Refrigerant Recharge
recharge.description: R-134a & R-1234yf (PAG oil included). Certified equipment, accurate charge.

compressor.title: Compressor Repair
compressor.description: Full compressor replacement and belt-drive repair for all vehicle makes.

leak.title: Leak Detection
leak.description: UV dye and vacuum pressure testing for precise refrigerant leak diagnosis.

diagnosis.title: Full AC Diagnosis
diagnosis.description: Electronic diagnostic scan and pressure testing — know exactly what's wrong.

automotive.mapSubtitle: Visit our shop or schedule a mobile service call.

process.headline: Our 4-Step Service Promise
process.subheadline: Every job — residential, commercial, or automotive — follows the same rigorous process.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Reach us 24/7 by phone, WhatsApp, or our online form. We respond within minutes.

diagnosis.title: Expert Diagnosis
diagnosis.description: Our certified technician performs a thorough inspection and gives you a clear, upfront quote.

repair.title: Precision Repair
repair.description: We use manufacturer-grade parts and EPA-compliant refrigerants. No shortcuts.

guarantee.title: Quality Guarantee
guarantee.description: All work is backed by a written warranty. We're not done until you're 100% satisfied.

items.name: Carlos M.
items.text: My AC died on a 95°F Saturday. CryoTech had a tech at my door within 2 hours. Fixed on the spot. Absolutely incredible service.

items.name: Maria L.
items.text: We manage 3 restaurants in Miami. CryoTech handles all our refrigeration contracts. Zero downtime in 2 years. They're worth every penny.

items.name: James T.
items.text: My truck AC was dead in the middle of summer. They recharged it with R-134a and found a small leak — all in under 90 minutes. Incredible.

items.name: Sofia R.
items.text: Professional, punctual, and transparent with pricing. My new Carrier unit installation was flawless. Highly recommend for any Miami homeowner.

items.name: David K.
items.text: Our walk-in freezer failed at 2 AM. CryoTech's emergency team was there by 4 AM. Saved thousands in product loss. True 24/7 service.

items.name: Ana P.
items.text: They installed a UV air purifier and cleaned all my ducts. Air quality improved dramatically — my family's allergies are finally under control.
